author: Pixelastic
subject: perf(deepFreeze): Removing the calls to deepFreeze
body:
Fixes algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#301

As discussed in algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#301, we currently do not really need to call
deepFreeze on the new state. The operation itself is expensive and we
do not really need this protetion currently because we always document
modifying the object through its methods.
